positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a majestic, stylized crescent moon and a grouping of whimsical, bioluminescent celestial flora (shooting stars, lavender stalks, stylized nebula clouds). The composition is perfectly balanced and centered, suitable for circular or square garment placement. High contrast, deep navy blue and indigo background with glowing gold and cyan accents. Geometric shapes, clean lines, single-color silhouettes for maximal print impact. Studio lighting, graphic novel style, solid flat vector art.
